title: Verify deterministic Insight Report generation
preconditions: Compatible coherent producer fixtures and released active policy versions are available.
steps: Generate reports with explicit and default policies, permuted source order, repeated identical inputs, maximum accepted bounds, one-over-limit input, no plan, and historical current-corrected evidence.
expected: One ephemeral bounded report with complete content and provenance is returned deterministically; limits fail early; no durable state or unsupported claim appears.
